Senior Software Engineer

Acme Corp

Location: San Francisco, CA (Remote OK)

Salary: $150,000 – $200,000 per year

About the Role

We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our growing team. You will design, build and maintain scalable backend services.

Required Skills

  • Python
  • PostgreSQL
  • REST API design
  • Docker

Preferred Skills

  • FastAPI
  • Kubernetes
  • AWS

Responsibilities

  • Design and implement backend microservices
  • Collaborate with product and design teams
  • Conduct code reviews and mentor junior engineers
